recommendations.title: Whitney: Can I Be Me
recommendations.overview: The life and tragic death of Whitney Houston.

recommendations.title: Oppenheimer
recommendations.overview: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.

recommendations.title: Kurt & Courtney

recommendations.title: Aileen: Life and Death of a Serial Killer

recommendations.title: The Hurt Locker
recommendations.overview: During the Iraq War, a Sergeant recently assigned to an army bomb squad is put at odds with his squad mates due to his maverick way of handling his work.

recommendations.title: American Sniper

recommendations.title: John Rabe
recommendations.overview: A true-story account of a German businessman who saved more than 200,000 Chinese during the Nanjing massacre in 1937-38.

recommendations.title: The Thin Red Line

recommendations.title: The Shadow in My Eye
